name: Pet MD Deodorizing Sweet Pea & Vanilla Cat & Dog Body Spray, 8 oz bottle
description: Help tame your fur baby’s coat and control any odors with Pet MD Deodorizing Sweet Pea & Vanilla Cat & Dog Body Spray! It is designed to eliminate odors for long periods of time, including those in hard-to-reach areas like skin folds and undercoats. It naturally reduces static as well, so it is helpful for taming wild coats. Its refreshing scent, static-reduction, and mild cleansing action helps minimize expensive grooming visits as well!

ingredients: Deboned Lamb, Lamb Broth, Beef Broth, Beef, Beef Liver, Dried Egg Whites, Sweet Potatoes, Carrots, Potato Starch, Peas, Guar Gum, Tricalcium Phosphate, Sunflower Oil, Sodium Phosphate, Salt, Potassium Chloride, Natural Flavor, Minerals (Zinc Amino Acid Chelate, Iron Amino Acid Chelate, Copper Amino Acid Chelate, Manganese Amino Acid Chelate, Sodium Selenite, Cobalt Amino Acid Chelate, Potassium Iodide), Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate, Niacin Supplement, D-Calcium Pantothenate, Vitamin A Supplement, Riboflavin Supplement, Biotin, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Vitamin B6), Vitamin D3 Supplement, Folic Acid), Choline Chloride, Xanthan Gum.

name: HuggleHounds Huggle Mutts LuLu the Mutt Tough Squeaky Plush Dog Toy, Small
description: Start a tug of woof with your sidekick using HuggleHounds Huggle Mutts LuLu the Mutt. This tough, squeaky, plush, toy for dogs is designed for durability with two layers of lining on the inside, and a super soft outside that’s paw-fect for cuddling. It is crafted to encourage natural tugging instincts with knots in the limbs and five squeakers. This plush dog toy is constructed to help promote healthy exercise and mental stimulation. It is machine-washable for easy cleaning if your mini mate ever gets it too muddy.

name: PureBites Chicken Freeze Dried Topper for Dogs
description: Packed with protein, the PureBites Topper Chicken Recipe Dog Freeze Dried Food is a paw-fect limited ingredient dog food, mixer or topper for your furbaby. It’s made with just 19 simple human-grade ingredients, and you can read, pronounce and trust every one of them. This food includes pure chicken, carrot and apple and essential vitamins, minerals and natural preservatives, so it’s su-paw tasty and healthy. It’s free of bad stuff like artificial colors, fillers and sweeteners. Sourced and made right here in the USA, the food is delicately freeze dried, helping to preserve its fresh, raw nutrition while locking in the delicious taste. This food offers many of the benefits of raw without the hassle of refrigeration, making it a convenient choice for busy pet parents and their best friends who are always on the go.
ingredients: American Sourced human grade chicken, chicken liver, chicken heart, carrot, apple, flaxseed, inulin, dried kelp, potassium chloride, salt, mixed tocopherols (preservative), fish oil, zinc proteinate, iron proteinate, vitamin E supplement, copper proteinate, manganese proteinate, vitamin D3 supplement, rosemary extract.

name: The Foggy Dog Onyx Waxed Canvas Dog Waste Bag Holder
description: Pick up after your paw-tner in style with The Foggy Dog Onyx Waxed Canvas Dog Waste Bag Holder! This chic piece features black waxed canvas, and a gold zipper and clip for an eye-catching finish. Plus, the clip allows you to easily attach the bag to the O-ring on your leash!

name: Frisco Pineapple Polyester Breakaway Cat Collar with Bell
description: Sightseeing around the backyard or taking in the great indoors? Whether your cat goes outside or is indoor only, this breakaway collar combines comfort and safety for every kitty. It’s made with high-quality polyester webbing and has sturdy plastic hardware with rounded edges that don’t poke, a metal ring for an ID tag, and a quick-release breakaway buckle. It clips in easily and stays on securely, but comes off quickly if the collar is pulled. Cats can explore with confidence thanks to this kitty safety mechanism, since it allows the collar to come undone if it gets snagged on a branch, furniture or other hazard. Choose from various adjustable sizes and fashion-forward prints.

name: Livelong Healthy & Strong Duck & Sweet Potato Recipe Wet Dog Food, 12.8-oz can, case of 12
description: Quack up your sidekick with a with a meal that’s just ducky when you serve Livelong Healthy & Strong Duck & Sweet Potato Recipe Wet Dog Food. This natural food for dogs is made with duck as the number one ingredient. It is paw-fect for all breeds of dogs in any stage of life and does not contain any grains, gluten, artificial flavors or preservatives. This wet dog food is 90% meat and crafted in a pate-style with delicious organic veggies. It’s proudly made in the USA and packaged in a case of 12 convenient 12.8-ounce cans for nourishing your canine companion.
ingredients: Duck, Turkey, Duck and Turkey Broth, Chicken liver, Organic Sweet Potatoes, Organic Peas, Organic Carrots, Chicken Liver, Guar Gum, Vitamins (Vitamin E Supplement, Niacin Supplement, L-Ascorbyl-2- Polyphosphate (Source of Vitamin C), Thiamine Mononitrate (Source of Vitamin B1), Calcium Pantothenate, Vitamin A Supplement, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride (Source of Vitamin B6), Riboflavin Supplement (Source of Vitamin B2), Folic Acid, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Biotin, Vitamin D3 Supplement), Minerals (Zinc Sulfate, Iron Sulfate, Copper Sulfate, Manganese Sulfate, Selenium Yeast (inactive), Potassium Iodide).

name: Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement
description: Give your furry friend a little boost with Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement. This liquid dietary supplement provides iron, copper and five essential vitamins for those pets that may not be getting complete nutrition. Easily dispensed, the 1 oz. size comes with a dropper for convenience. Pet-Tinic Liquid Vitamin-Mineral Dog & Cat Supplement is meat-flavored for a taste your paw-tner will enjoy.
ingredients: Iron 12.5mg, Copper 0.2mg, Thiamine 2mg, Riboflavin 1mg, Niacin 10mg, Vitamin B6 1.0mg, Vitamin B 12 2.1mcg.

name: Wysong Dream Rabbit Freeze-Dried Raw Dog, Cat & Ferret Treats
description: Dream Treats are starch-free raw meat treats, uniquely processed without damaging heat using the Wysong True Non-Thermal manufacturing technology. Each meaty disc is loaded with extra vitamins, minerals, prebiotics, probiotics, enzymes, powerful natural nutraceuticals and more! A truly beneficial dog, cat, or ferret treat (yes, it's a raw ferret food too)! Dream Treats natural dog and cat treats are great tasting, no-worry, no-guilt snacking for the important companion animal in your life. The no-mess discs are easy to carry along for training treats and excellent to share any time. Serve every day to ensure an optimal supply of important nutrients and as a gift of love...real genetically appropriate natural food your pet dreams about.
ingredients: Rabbit, Natural Flavor, Taurine, Organic Blueberry, Organic Barley Grass, Chia Seeds, Broccoli Sprouts, Carrots, Plums, Whey, Sea Salt, Dried Kelp, Yeast Extract, Citric Acid, Mixed Tocopherols, Rosemary Extract, Yeast Culture, Minerals (Potassium Chloride, Zinc Proteinate, Zinc Sulfate, Ferrous Sulfate, Iron Proteinate, Copper Sulfate, Copper Proteinate, Manganese Sulfate, Manganese Proteinate, Sodium Selenite, Calcium Iodate), Calcium Carbonate, Vitamins (Ascorbic Acid [Source of Vitamin C], Vitamin E Supplement, Niacin Supplement, Calcium Pantothenate, Vitamin A Supplement, Thiamine Mononitrate, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Riboflavin Supplement, Vitamin D3 Supplement, Biotin, Vitamin B12 Supplement, Folic Acid), Dried Bacillus Licheniformis Fermentation Product, Dried Aspergillus Oryzae Fermentation Product, Dried Aspergillus Niger Fermentation Product, Dried Enterococcus Faecium Fermentation Product, Dried Lactobacillus Casei Fermentation Product, Dried Lactobacillus Acidophilus Fermentation Product, Dried Bacillus Subtilis Fermentation Product, Dried Lactobacillus Plantarum Fermentation Product, Dried Lactobacillus Lactis Fermentation Product.

name: Doggy Do Good Certified Compostable Premium Dog & Cat Waste Bags, Small Handle Bags - On Rolls + Dispenser, 60 count
description: Pick up after your furry friend with these Doggy Do Good Certified Compostable Premium Dog & Cat Waste Bags, Small Handle Bags - On Rolls + Dispenser! These scent-free, tear-free, leak-proof small waste bags are thick (20 microns thick) and tough, keeping the contents and unpleasant odors inside the bag where they belong. They are 38% vegetable based and made from corn starch, an annually renewable source, along with other bio-based proprietary components. Safer for the environment than polyethylene plastic bags, these Doggy Do Good bags break down in your properly managed Home Compost—this helps keep parks and neighborhoods clean and green! Since these waste bags are soft to the touch, they don’t stick to each other, which makes them paws-itively easy to open. And since they are scent-free they won’t bother pet parents who are sensitive to fragrances! These small bags measure 4.5 in. x 11.0 in. (folded) / 8.5 in. x 11.0 in with gusset expanded, making them a paw-fect option for small dogs, toy breeds and puppies. The gusseted side panels expand for maximum capacity! There are 15 bags per roll and the core of each roll is made from recycled materials. These rolls fit in any standard-sized poop bag dispenser. The included heavy-duty dispenser is built to last! It even has a stainless-steel carabiner clip, so you can clip it to your leash or doggie bag—keep it attached during walks, so you are always prepared! And you can feel extra good knowing that Doggy Do Good does good for the environment because they are part of a group of organizations that pledge a minimum of 1% of annual sales to environmental causes. Doggy Do Good donates an additional portion of proceeds to rescues and animal welfare organizations, too!

name: OraVet Plaque Prevention Dog Dental Gel
description: Keep your pet’s mouth fresh and clean the OraVet Plaque Prevention Gel for Pets. A great solution for pets who don’t tolerate brushing well, this gel acts as an invisible barrier to prevent bacteria from sticking to the surface of the teeth—which in turn will help prevent the formation of harmful plaque and tartar. Tasteless and odorless, it’s easily applied by swabbing over the gum lines with the included applicator, making at-home dental care a breeze. Just use once a week in between regular dental cleanings, and take pride in knowing that regular dental care supports your dog’s overall health.

name: PoopShark Leash Pouch & Poopbag Holder Dog Poop Dispenser, Black
description: With the PoopShark Leash Pouch & Poopbag Holder Dog Poop Dispenser, you’re always ready to clean up after your furbaby. The pouch is a paw-some way to carry folded paper bags, repurposed plastic bags and treats on your pup’s leash. The carabiner easily attaches the pouch to your leash at two points, so it won’t swing around as you walk. The drawstring closure is simple and secure, and waterproof recycled polyester keeps those poop bags dry.

name: Go Pet Club 32-in Large Perch Cat Tree Condo
description: Shhh, don’t wake your feline friend as she comfortably snoozes in her Go Pet Club 32-in Cat Tree Condo with Large Perch. This tree features an oversized bottom condo with walls and a roof for ideal privacy when nap time rolls around. The top and center perches provide surfaces for your best bud to sit, lounge and keep an eye on her surroundings while the sisal-wrapped post is made for safe scratching. Crafted in a durable wood and finished with a soft faux-fur, your pal will have no problem settling into this cozy tree. When your girl is feeling playful, she can swat away at the dangly rope toy!

name: Frisco Outdoor Waterproof Stinkproof PVC Rope Leash
description: Looking for the right leash for your water-loving dog? The Frisco Outdoor Waterproof Stink-Proof PVC Rope Leash is perfect for dogs who enjoy a swim and pet parents who want to leave that tell-tale funk behind on the trail! This classic leash is made with polyester rope and coated in matte PVC that resists water and odor-causing bacteria. It features a lobster clasp that helps keep your pup securely leashed, and at the other end there’s a convenient D-ring where you can attach a waste bag dispenser. When you hit the road together, just grab this leash and you’re ready to go. Plus, it's available in three colors so you can perfectly match it to your pup’s style and personality.

name: Frisco Stretchy Dog & Cat Fleece Vest
description: A fleece vest makes a great addition to anyone’s cold-weather wardrobe, even your pet! These cozy, polyester fleece vests are made of stretchy fabric, and they’re thin enough to work as a layering piece and just warm enough to work as a standalone vest if your dog only needs a light layer to stay comfy during cold weather. Made with a pullover design, so it’s easy to put on and always keeps your pet cozy.

name: PetRageous Designs Fishbone Kitty Ceramic Cat Dish
description: Add a little charm to mealtime with the Fishbone Kitty Cat Dish from PetRageous Designs! This handmade ceramic stoneware saucer can stand to frequent use and cleanings and the design features a lovely cat silhouette against a white and taupe fishbone pattern across the basin. This 2.5-ounce dish the perfect size for serving up a delectable meal for your feline friend in style. Plus, it’s completely dishwasher and microwave safe so heating and cleaning are easy!

name: Quick-Tag Personalized Dog & Cat ID Tag, Metallic Gold
description: This gold-planted, brass Quick-Tag Personalized Dog & Cat ID tag can be laser engraved on both sides with three lines of personalized text—add her name, an emergency phone number, her address or even her medical conditions. Now, everyone will know who your furry friend is, so they can safely get her back home in case she ever gets lost! And since it’s laser-engraved and not simply printed on, your pet’s information will stay clear and visible through endless days of play.
